title: Tell Us Who They Were
subtitle: Share a personal memory or tribute to honor their legacy.
introText: Tell us who they were. Every story, every photo, every voice note helps keep their memory alive. This is a living archive — built by the people, for the people.
step1Subtitle: Search for a martyr by name.
step2Title: What would you like to share?
storyPlaceholder: Share what you remember about them... a moment, a habit, something they said...
photoUploadTitle: Click to upload a photo or video
voiceUploadTitle: Click to record a voice note
reviewNotice: All submissions are reviewed before publishing. We treat every memory with dignity and respect.
successMessage: Your memory has been submitted for review. Our team will carefully review and publish it with the utmost respect.
